extension.name: chat-with-content
extension.title: Chat with Content
extension.description: Chat with your published content on Connect using an LLM. Pick a report, notebook, or static page you can access, and the app answers questions about it in a chat panel beside the rendered page, running as the signed-in viewer through a Connect Visitor API Key so each person only chats with content they are allowed to open. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Azure, or AWS Bedrock.
